sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f method: base position sizing on largest historical loss from equalized percentage P&L data, multiply by current instrument price for risk-of-ruin calculations. Specific optimal_f and kelly_fraction values not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Position size must be based on the largest historical loss observed, adjusted and equalized when using percentage gains/losses data, and multiplied by current instrument price for risk-of-ruin calculations.
